summary: Complete Master Locations Integration Testing - Verified all location dropdowns (Territory, State, City) across 6 pages are correctly using data from Master Locations API. Backend returns 5 territories, 23 states, and 90 cities. All cascading dropdown functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Add Lead page (/leads/new) - Region dropdown shows all 5 territories from master locations (Central India, East India, North India, South India, West India)
Add Lead page - State dropdown populates correctly based on selected Region (South India shows: Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Telangana)
Add Lead page - City dropdown populates correctly based on selected State (Karnataka shows: Belgaum, Bengaluru, Hubli, Mangaluru, Mysuru)
Accounts List page (/accounts) - Territory filter shows all 5 territories plus 'All Territories' option
Accounts List page - State filter populates based on territory selection (West India shows: All States, Goa, Gujarat, Maharashtra)
Accounts List page - City filter populates based on state selection (Maharashtra shows: All Cities, Aurangabad, Mumbai, Nagpur, Nashik, Pune, Thane)
Account Performance page (/account-performance) - Territory filter shows all 5 territories from master locations
Account Performance page - State filter populates correctly (North India shows: All States, Delhi NCR, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir, Punjab, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand)
Team Management page (/team) - Add Team Member form Territory dropdown shows all 5 territories
Team Management page - Add form State dropdown cascades correctly based on Territory
Team Management page - Add form City dropdown cascades correctly based on State
Sales Targets page (/targets) - CityForm displays cities from master locations (South India shows cities like Guntur, Nellore, Tirupati, Vijayawada, Visakhapatnam for Andhra Pradesh)
Lead Discovery page (/lead-discovery) - City dropdown contains cities from master locations (Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Kolkata, Ahmedabad)
Backend API GET /api/master-locations/flat returns correct data: 5 territories, 23 states, 90 cities
useMasterLocations hook correctly fetches and provides location data across all components
critical_code_review_comments: useMasterLocations hook properly implements loading, error states and caching with useCallback
All components correctly use the hook's helper functions (getStateNamesByTerritoryName, getCityNamesByStateName)
Cascading dropdowns properly reset child selections when parent changes
Edit mode in AddEditLead preserves existing values even if not in master locations list (backward compatibility)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 pages tested with master locations integration working)

seed_data_creation: Master locations already seeded with 5 territories, 23 states, 90 cities
context_for_next_testing_agent: Master Locations API integration is complete and verified. The useMasterLocations hook in /app/frontend/src/hooks/useMasterLocations.js provides location data to all components. API endpoint: GET /api/master-locations/flat. All cascading Territory->State->City dropdowns work correctly across Add Lead, Accounts List, Account Performance, Team Management (Add/Edit forms), Sales Targets (CityForm), and Lead Discovery pages.
